allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\(s,indent=2\)\) for s in data if ''FAT'' in s.get\(''name'',''''\) or ''2026-03-03'' in s.get\(''id'',''''\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s[''id''], s[''name''], s.get\(''bugCount'',0\), ''bugs''\) for s in data.get\(''sessions'',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) sessions = data.get\(''sessions'', data\) if isinstance\(data, dict\) else data for s in \(sessions if isinstance\(sessions, list\) else [sessions]\): sid = s.get\(''id'',''?''\) name = s.get\(''name'',''?''\) sprint = s.get\(''sprint'',''?''\) print\(f'' {sid} | {name} | sprint:{sprint}''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) s = data.get\(''session'', data\) print\(f''ID: {s[""id""]}''\) print\(f''Name: {s[""name""]}''\) print\(f''Project: {s[""project""]}''\) print\(f''Sprint: {s[""sprint""]}''\) print\(f''Description: {s.get\(""description"",""""\)}''\) print\(f''Bugs: {len\(s.get\(""bugs"",[]\)\)}''\) print\(f''Snapshots: {len\(s.get\(""snapshots"",[]\)\)}''\) print\(f''Recordings: {len\(s.get\(""recordings"",[]\)\)}''\) print\(f''Clock: {s[""clock""]}s''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) bugs = data.get\(''bugs'', data\) for b in \(bugs if isinstance\(bugs, list\) else [bugs]\): print\(f'' {b.get\(""id"",""?""\)} | {b.get\(""title"",""?""\)} | {b.get\(""severity"",""?""\)} | {b.get\(""status"",""?""\)}''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[''session'']; print\(''snapshots:'', len\(d.get\(''snapshots'',[]\)\), ''| recordings:'', len\(d.get\(''recordings'',[]\)\), ''| bugs:'', len\(d.get\(''bugs'',[]\)\)\); [print\(f''  snap {s[""id""]}: url={s.get\(""url"",""?""\)} | dataUrl len={len\(s.get\(""screenshotDataUrl"",""""\)\)} | trigger={s.get\(""triggeredBy"",""?""\)}''\) for s in d.get\(''snapshots'',[]\)]")
